User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/

# AI Crawlers Configuration
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Content Signals (RFC Draft)
Content-Signal: ai-train=no, search=yes, ai-input=no
